title: Alpha Analytics raises guidance
body: Alpha Analytics said demand improved and margins expanded. The company raised guidance for the next quarter.

title: Beta Bancorp warns on credit costs
body: Beta Bancorp warned credit losses could rise and management expects weaker revenue in the quarter.

title: $AAA backlog looks strong
body: Investors noted Alpha Analytics backlog growth looked strong, though supply risk remains uncertain.

title: Beta Bancorp capital update
body: Beta Bancorp reported stable deposits but no improvement in loan growth.
